description_long: This is a classic sub-style sandwich featuring a crusty, golden-brown baguette sliced lengthwise and generously filled with layers of deli meats, likely including salami and ham, as well as slices of tomato, crisp lettuce, and rings of red onion. The sandwich's cross-section reveals a colorful and appetizing arrangement of ingredients, with the meats and vegetables stacked neatly between the bread halves. The bread appears slightly rustic with a textured, flour-dusted surface, and the fillings are fresh and vibrant, suggesting a freshly made deli sandwich. The visible ingredients are distinct and easily identifiable, with the green of the lettuce, red of the tomato, and pinkish-red of the meats providing visual contrast. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the sandwich is presented in isolation against a plain background. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a sandwich that might be found in an urban deli, café, or food truck.
description: A hearty sub sandwich with a crusty baguette, layered with deli meats, lettuce, tomato, and onion. The ingredients are fresh and colorful, making it visually appealing and appetizing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the sandwich with visible layers of meat, lettuce, and tomato peeking out from the bread.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the sandwich, clearly showing the stacked layers of meats, lettuce, tomato, and onion between the bread halves.
description_view_2: Angled view from the opposite end, highlighting the rounded bread top and the protruding slices of meat and vegetables.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the crusty, textured surface of the bread, with minimal filling visible.
